title: Toasty Australian Tofu Grill
description: A malty, molten, brunch-mood Australian dish featuring genmaicha, grilled to perfection in a tajine clay vessel, perfect for a dairy-free friendly meal.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat, approximately 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the brewed genmaicha tea, maple syrup, and malt extract to make the malty glaze.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the malty glaze, making sure each piece is fully covered.
Brush the tajine clay vessel with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Place the tofu cubes in the prepared tajine clay vessel, leaving some space between each cube for even cooking.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Grill the tofu for 10 minutes on each side, or until it is golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Let it rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
